name: DataFlow Agent
description: Autonomous on-chain agent for data processing with AI analysis, summarization, and structured extraction. Built for OOBE x Ace Data Cloud bounty.

capabilities.description: Sentiment analysis, entity extraction, and keyword detection from text using Ace Data Cloud NLP APIs
Long-form content summarization with configurable length and style
Extract structured data from unstructured text using JSON Schema validation

metadata.bounty: OOBE x Ace Data Cloud Autonomous Agent
